images.copyright: King penguin father checking egg (© McDonald Wildlife Photography Inc./Getty Images)
images.title: Feathered fathers
images.caption: Happy Father's Day!
images.desc: On the third Sunday in June, we celebrate Father's Day—a moment to thank the steady, watchful figures who help life grow and thrive. Across the world, fatherhood can take surprising and extraordinary forms.
